title: Player Map: live positions on the world map
author: Drums of War Team
preview: New interactive Player Map shows online players positioned on the world map with class colors, faction borders, zone breakdown, and auto-refresh every 15 seconds.

title: Admin Panel: Server logs, Docker management & config tools
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Admin panel now has live server log viewer, full Docker container management (start/stop/restart/update), and real-time server status checks.

title: Account registration with email verification
author: Drums of War Team
preview: New players can now register directly on the website. One registration creates accounts on all three servers (Classic, TBC, WotLK) after email verification.

title: Armory search now case-insensitive
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Character search in the Armory now works regardless of letter case across all servers, including WotLK.

title: Guide page updated with download links
author: Drums of War Team
preview: The How To Play guide now includes direct download links for all three game clients and uses the domain name for realmlist instead of IP address.

title: Talent trees: real spell values and rank-aware tooltips
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Talent tooltips now show actual spell values instead of format codes, and display the description for your learned rank — not just rank 1.

title: Armory: Talent Tree viewer added
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Character armory now shows the full talent tree for all three expansions. Browse a character's spent talents across all trees with visual icons, rank counters, and hover tooltips.

title: Honor, Online, Statistics & Auction House launched
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Four new community pages are live: Honor Leaderboard with faction tabs, Players Online with auto-refresh, server Statistics with race/class/level charts, and a live Auction House browser with search and filtering.

title: Server Management controls added to Admin panel
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Admins can now stop, restart, or trigger a full update-and-deploy pipeline for each game server directly from the admin panel, with real-time progress logs.

title: GM Admin Panel
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Server administrators now have a dedicated admin panel with real-time server monitoring, account management, uptime tracking, and announcement system.

title: How To Play guide added
author: Drums of War Team
preview: New connection guide with realmlist setup, client download links, and troubleshooting FAQ — everything you need to get started.

title: Character Transfer system live
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Transfer your characters between expansions directly from the website. Classic → TBC → WotLK progression path is now available for logged-in users.

title: Account Management page
author: Drums of War Team
preview: View your characters across all servers, change password, and manage your linked accounts from one place.

title: Unified login system
author: Drums of War Team
preview: One account now works across all three servers. Login once on the website to access Classic, TBC, and WotLK. Registration creates accounts on all realms simultaneously.

title: Armory: item icons and tooltips
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Character armory now shows real item icons with quality-colored borders and detailed stat tooltips on hover. Icons are cached locally for fast loading.

title: New unified website launched
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Welcome to the new Drums of War website! Modern dark theme, server status dashboard, character armory, and cross-expansion account system — all in one place.

title: Wrath of the Lich King server migrated to AzerothCore
author: Drums of War Team
preview: WotLK server has been migrated from CMaNGOS to AzerothCore for better stability, more content, and active development. All characters have been preserved.

title: Classic server upgraded to VMaNGOS
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Classic realm now runs on VMaNGOS — a more accurate vanilla emulator with better scripting, pathfinding, and authentic 1.12.1 experience.

title: Character transfer pipeline verified
author: Drums of War Team
preview: End-to-end character transfer from Classic through TBC to WotLK has been tested and verified. Characters, items, skills, and reputations transfer correctly.

title: All three servers online
author: Drums of War Team
preview: Classic (1.12.1), The Burning Crusade (2.4.3), and Wrath of the Lich King (3.3.5a) are all running and accepting connections. One realmlist for all three!
